description: Run faster and smoother with these Blaze shoes from reebok. The simple design is strong on performance and looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a casual look.Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for breathability Velcro strap closures for snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feet Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Soft, breathable fabric lining for comfort Mesh tongue for greater breathability Brand name appliqued on the tongue, printed on the velcro strap and on the backfoot Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Cushioned midsole for better shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with circular lugs and triangular lugs on the periphery of the shoe for better traction and flexibility Built up toe counter for better forefoot protection Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
